name: synap-escrow
description: AI-powered autonomous escrow platform with automatic payment release

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd web-app/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../../backend-ai && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend" "npm run ai"
